title: The Approved Supplier List Lifecycle
alt: Continuous loop for qualifying, approving, maintaining and reviewing suppliers

items.label: Identify & categorise
items.desc: Classify supplier by what they provide and risk to product

items.label: Assess by risk
items.desc: Questionnaire, GMP/GDP certificates and audit per ICH Q9

items.label: Define & approve
items.desc: Quality agreement, then formal quality-unit sign-off

items.label: Maintain controlled
items.desc: Document and change control under ICH Q10 and ALCOA+

items.label: Trigger reviews
items.desc: Re-qualify on events and dates, not the calendar alone

items.label: Off-board failures
items.desc: Suspend or disqualify, feed outcomes back into the list
